issues.detail: The skill file lacks explicit usage instructions, making it less actionable.
The skill file does not cover all error scenarios and edge cases for Nuxt usage.
The skill file provides examples but lacks step-by-step actionable procedures for common tasks.

scenarios.name: Dynamic SSR post page with SEO
scenarios.rationale: Baseline uses pages/posts/[slug].vue and useFetch but typically omits createError for 404 and uses generic useHead only; treatment uses useAsyncData with error handling, createError({statusCode:404}), and both useHead and useSeoMeta.

scenarios.name: Authenticated server route for post creation
scenarios.rationale: Baseline knows server/api/ exists but may not consistently use defineEventHandler, readBody, and a path-scoped middleware throwing createError({statusCode:401}); treatment composes index.post.ts plus server/middleware/auth.ts using getRequestURL to gate /api/admin.
